31         for i := gb.gap; i < position; i++ {                                                                         
32             gb.data[i-gb.gap+position] = gb.data[i]                                                                  
33         }                                                                                                            
34     }                                                                                                                
35     gb.gap = position                                                                                                
36 }                                                                                                                    
37                                                                                                                      
38 func (gb *GapBuffer) Delete(start, end int) {                                                                        
39     if start < 0 || end > gb.size || start >= end {                                                                  
40         return                                                                                                       
41     }                                                                                                                
42     copy(gb.data[start:], gb.data[end:gb.size])                                                                      
43     gb.size -= (end - start)                                                                                         
44     gb.gap -= (end - start)                                                                                          
45 }                                                                                                                    
46                                                                                                                      
47 func (gb *GapBuffer) Insert(runes []rune) {                                                                          
48     for _, r := range runes {                                                                                        
49         if gb.size < len(gb.data) {                                                                                  
50             gb.data[gb.gap] = r                                                                                      
51             gb.gap++                                                                                                 
52             gb.size++                                                                                                
53         }                                                                                                            
54     }                                                                                                                
55 }                                                                                                                    
56                                                                                                                      
57 func (gb *GapBuffer) String() string {                                                                               
58     return string(gb.data[:gb.size])                                                                                 
59 }                                                                                                                    
60                                                                                                                      
61 func main() {                                                                                                        
62     gb := NewGapBuffer(10)                                                                                           
63     gb.Insert([]rune("Hello"))                                                                                       
64     gb.MoveGap(5)                                                                                                    
65     gb.Insert([]rune(" World"))                                                                                      
66     gb.Delete(5, 11)                                                                                                 
67     fmt.Println(gb.String()) // Output: Hello                                                                        
68 }                                                                                                                    
█COMMAND██0003.txt██ master█                                                                            █67:0█
:
